summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of GovCon Command Center MVP. 28/28 backend tests pass (after applying a 1-line MongoDB tz_aware fix). Frontend RBAC, dashboard, opportunities table, opportunity detail workspace (Compliance NO-BID gate, Scorecard separate Strength vs Pwin), Verify/Pull mocks, secrets masking, members CRUD, profile-driven eligibility coloring all working.

issues: Tabs 'Fit & Overview' and 'Set-Aside' render correctly but lack data-testid='tab-fit' and data-testid='tab-setaside' attributes (only tab-compliance/budget/scorecard/decision exist). Add for testability.

action_items: Add data-testid='tab-fit' and data-testid='tab-setaside' to the Fit & Overview and Set-Aside tab buttons on OpportunityDetail.js (other 4 tabs already have testids).

Note: a backend datetime/MongoDB tz_aware bug was found and fixed in /app/backend/database.py — Motor was returning naive datetimes which caused TypeError 500 on /api/auth/reset-password and /api/auth/verify-email (and would have broken login lockout comparisons). Fix: AsyncIOMotorClient(..., tz_aware=True).
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py reset-password / verify-email previously crashed comparing naive vs aware datetimes — fixed by enabling tz_aware on Motor client. Worth adding a regression test.
rbac.py role check is clean and consistent across all routers — good. Owner-only transfer endpoint correctly protected.
Secrets masking via Fernet + mask_secret('•…last4') is implemented correctly and never returns raw keys, even on PUT response.
Org scoping is enforced on every endpoint via require_role(orgId) — verified via 403 RBAC test suite (8 negative tests).
Mock endpoints (verify, pull) write refreshJobs + auditLog and return mock:true — proper for Phase 1-4.
Server returns _id as 'id' via serialize() — no ObjectIds leak to JSON.
test_credentials: admin@govcon.io / Admin#2026 (owner), editor@govcon.io / Editor#2026, viewer@govcon.io / Editor#2026
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed (Orbital Defense Systems org with 12+ opportunities). Tests created throwaway users (test_*@example.com), one TEST_OPP_* opportunity (deleted), and toggled 8(a) cert on profile (toggled back).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py covers auth, RBAC matrix (8 negative tests), opp CRUD, verify/pull mocks, members, secrets masking, profile-driven eligibility. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. The only known frontend gap is missing data-testids on tab-fit and tab-setaside.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA: Motor's AsyncIOMotorClient by default decodes BSON datetimes as naive (tzinfo=None) while the codebase uses datetime.now(timezone.utc) for inserts. When endpoints compared a stored value (naive after round-trip) against now_utc() (aware), Python raised TypeError -> FastAPI 500. Reproduction: register a user, call /api/auth/forgot-password, then call /api/auth/reset-password with the returned token -> 500. Same path for /api/auth/verify-email. Mitigation: Pass tz_aware=True to AsyncIOMotorClient so all retrieved datetimes carry UTC tzinfo. Applied and verified: both endpoints now return 200 and downstream tests pass.
